titleStmt.title: SII 40.60: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 60. (A.R. No. B. 39 of 1930.) Gāmālapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On three faces of the Nandi pillar lying in front of the ruined Śambhu temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 11[44], Chitrabhānu, Māgha, śu. 13, Thursday, corresponding to 1223 A.D., January 16. However the week day was Monday.

Gives a list of the plots of land granted in various years to the temple of Svayambhūdēva of Ubbēpalli by Kummarikuṇṭala Bētarāju, Bhāskaradēva, Ramadēva and Jāyapa-Nāyaka for conducting worship, providing food offerings and burning a perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1144 Agunēṁṭi citrabhānu
saṁvatsara māgha śu 13 gu .
śrīman mahāmaṇḍalēśvara kākati
yya gaṇapatidēva mahārāju
sukha saṁkathā vinōdaṁbuna
Anmakoṁḍa mōdalugānu prithivi
rājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgā .
śrīmatu kuṁmarikuṁṭala bē
tarāju Ubbēpalli svayaṁbhu
dēvaraku beṭṭina vritti veli vōla
muṁgārakuṁṭa sahitaṁ
lōpalāvelupalānu paṭṭina maṁduma
juvvikanu paṁdumu mrōṁtuvu cēnu Iddu
mu viśvāvasu saṁvatsarāna bhāskaradēvaṁ
ḍu peṭṭina vritti sanaṁgakuṁṭa kaḍanu Eḍu
dumu naṟṟa Eḍakaḍanu paṁdumu liṁga
kuṁṭa yiddumu bahudānya
saṁvatsara vaiśākhamāsāna Ājñāpālaru
ni datti sanagakuṁṭa kaḍapuṭeṁḍu
krayavritti rāmadēvanivāri cenu piṁga
literuvu Uttarānamuttumu pramō
da saṁvatsarāna jāyapanāyuni datti
piṁgali tala polāna padēṁdumu ve
ridatte piṁgali teruvu Utānapaṁnidumu
vīridatti vikrama saṁvatsarānanu tama talliki
ṁbuṇyamugā dhāravōśinadi piṁga
li teruvu Uttarānanu paṁdumu Akha
ḍadīpānaku sanaṁgakuṁṭa tūrppu
na Aṁtaṭi pōciraḍḍi cekoniccinaḍapaṁdu
mu kuṁṭatōṁṭalōdi Āyana jī
tānaku piṁgaliteruvu Uttarānaniccinadi
Āṟdumu . bhāskaradēvanidatti saṁkadēva
liṁgamukuṁṭa tana 5

nīru nēla bētarāju datti [U]la cenu
Adda Anumēnikāṁkāḍanu padi
visaṁlūnara pinna kāluvanu mōga
vātanu Addalāgaṭṭu trappagaladi
Adda sarvvamānyamu yicci rāju
cēnu diguvanu reṁḍu visālu bhā
skaradēvani datti gōsagicēnu padi vī
sāluṁ dānilāḍana tōṁṭalu
paḍumaṭa Adda jayapanāyu
nidatti suravāyanu padi
vīsālu dēvara polānaku su
kamu paṁnnu sarvvamānyamu dē
varadīpānaku Iccina dattiṁ kā
nuvīsāmu gu Okkaṭi
bahubhirvvasudhādattārājabhissagarā
dibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadābhūmi
stasyatasya tadāphalaṁ . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vāyō harēti va
suṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvarṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāytē krimiḥ .
virōdhi saṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 5 sō
parvvataṁ mallikhājjunanāyini rā
jyāna jaḍa kommanappanaṁgāri ce
ta guriṁdāla mādavuṁḍu
sannāṁḍi prōlaya . peddapōcireḍḍi . seṭṭi
baṁmmaya . babbiseṭṭi bāṁbayalu
krayamu koni kka peṭṭi vritti
nūṁ sēnu kuṁṭa tōṁṭa Eḍiba
ridra jītālakicciri .
Digital edition of SII 40.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
